# BuyerGrid

BuyerGrid is a network of 3,378 Facebook real estate groups serving Telugu-speaking property buyers and NRIs, with 29.7 lakh total members including 5.3 lakh NRI and overseas Telugu buyers.

## What BuyerGrid does

BuyerGrid connects builders, developers, and real estate brokers with active Telugu property buyers across Hyderabad, Andhra Pradesh, Visakhapatnam, Guntur, and Telugu NRI communities worldwide. Promoters pay to run pinned posts, banner placements, and campaign packages across the network.

## Key facts

- 3,378 active Facebook real estate groups
- 29.7 lakh total members across all groups (30 lakh+)
- 5.3 lakh NRI and overseas Telugu buyers (5 lakh+)
- Largest single group: Hyderabad Real Estate Properties Investors — 2,54,200 members
- Top 10 groups: 9.8 lakh reach · Top 30 groups: 14.2 lakh reach · Top 100 groups: 19.0 lakh reach
- Core coverage: Hyderabad & Telangana (~17 lakh), Andhra Pradesh (~5.4 lakh), NRI/Overseas (~5.3 lakh)
- Contact: WhatsApp Hari Prasad +91 9663088484 / info@buyergrid.in

## Pages
